title: Add Project name to calendar sync.
excerpt: When calender sync with outlook the project name isnt listed.  Just the project line items name that you can assign a date to.  With multiple projects having the same project events this causes confution as to what proje…

posts.author: Archestra69 (Steve Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: When calender sync with outlook the project name isnt listed. Just the project line items name that you can assign a date to. With multiple projects having the same project events this causes confution as to what project the event belongs to.

posts.author: sya (Sy A)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same issue. The Board’s name syncs to the calendar so every task says: “[BOARD NAME]: Task 1” but since I have several different groups on the same board with the same tasks, I’m not sure if it’s Task 1 for Project A or B or C. Currently, the calendar sync is setup for only one way to structure Monday.com boards: one board per project. We need the option for the calendar to reflect that some board may contain multiple project groups and for the calendar to reflect the group name instead of the board name to be useful.
